panels.title: System Uptime

panels.description: ZFS ARC current size, target size (c), and maximum allowed size (c_max)
panels.title: ZFS ARC Size History

panels.description: ZFS ARC cache hit rate (demand data + metadata hits vs total lookups)
panels.title: ZFS ARC Hit Rate

panels.description: Overall host CPU utilisation across all 6 cores
panels.title: Host CPU Usage

panels.description: Physical host RAM: used, buffers+cache, and available — out of total
panels.title: Host RAM Usage

panels.description: Physical disk throughput: nvme0n1 (Crucial P1 1TB), sda (WD 1TB HDD), sdb (WD 8TB HDD). ZFS virtual disks excluded.
panels.title: Host Disk I/O (Physical Disks)

panels.description: Network traffic on physical NIC (eno1), bridge (vmbr0), and Tailscale (tailscale0)
panels.title: Host Network I/O

panels.description: Disk capacity for all storage: / (NVMe pve-root), /mnt/bckpHDD (sda1 backup HDD), ZFS pool vm-8tb-hdd0 (full 7.3TB pool including all VM zvols), and LXC container subvolumes. Data from proxmox-node-exporter on port 9101.
panels.title: Disk Capacity
Temperatures
panels.description: Current temperatures — CPU package & cores, NVMe, Dell SMM, PCH

panels.title: CPU Temperatures — History
panels.description: CPU package and per-core temperature over time

panels.title: Storage & Board Temperatures — History
panels.description: NVMe, Dell SMM, and PCH temperatures over time

panels.title: Virtual Disk — Allocated vs Used per VM
panels.description: Allocated = thin-provisioned volsize. Used = physically written to ZFS pool.

panels.title: ZFS Pool — vm-8tb-hdd0 Physical Space
panels.description: Pool total, physically allocated (written), and free. Not thin-provisioned.

panels.title: Virtual Disk Detail
panels.description: Per-disk breakdown: allocated volsize, physically used, and free per VM/LXC
